self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: R1 A Thousand Nights' Dawnsong: for each party member (other than the wielder) sharing the wielder's Elemental Type, the wielder gains 32 EM (max 3 stacks = 96 EM). The counterpart effect for different-element allies (+10% of the wielder's own Elemental DMG Bonus per stack, max 3) is not modeled — it requires knowing the wielder's own element dynamically, which isn't supported yet.
